mapper.select: SELECT id, warehouse_code as "warehouseCode", warehouse_name as "warehouseName", warehouse_type as "warehouseType", address_line1 as "addressLine1", address_line2 as "addressLine2", city, state, pincode, country, latitude, longitude, timezone, contact_phone as "contactPhone", contact_email as "contactEmail", manager_id as "managerId", max_capacity_units as "maxCapacityUnits", current_utilization_pct as "currentUtilizationPct", is_active as "isActive", is_returns_center as "isReturnsCenter", operating_hours_json as "operatingHoursJson", supported_carriers_json as "supportedCarriersJson", created_time as "createdTime", last_modified_time as "lastModifiedTime" FROM warehouses WHERE id = #{id}
